Name: Day 11 | Lightspeed Gaming & Interactive Media | Moritz Baier-Lentz
Description:
**FUND OVERVIEW**
Fund: Lightspeed Gaming & Interactive Media
AUM: $29B+ (total Lightspeed), $6.5B+ gaming pool
Stage: Seed to Series A
Check Size: $500K - $5M+
Geographic Focus: Global (13 offices across US, Europe, Asia)

**PARTNER DETAILS**
Name: Moritz Baier-Lentz
Title: Partner, Head of Gaming & Interactive Media
Email: moritz@lsvp.com

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
Lightspeed Gaming & Interactive Media invests at the intersection of gaming and artificial intelligence, with a specific focus on foundation models for spatiotemporal reasoning (action policies and world models), generative media creation, and agentic simulations in video games. Led by Moritz Baier-Lentz, a former professional Diablo II player (global #1 ranking), the team brings deep gaming operational expertise combined with technical depth in AI infrastructure. Their thesis centers on gaming-born technology fueling broader AI applications—from GPUs to real-time engines to synthetic environments. They actively invest in AI-native game development platforms, dynamic world generation, and intelligent NPC systems.

**FIT SCORE:** 92/100

**NOTABLE INVESTMENTS**
- Epic Games (Unreal Engine, Fortnite, $31.5B valuation)
- Stability AI (generative AI, $1B valuation)
- Inworld AI (AI character engine, Series B in under 2 years)
- Tripledot Studios (mobile gaming unicorn)
- Theorycraft Games (AI-powered game studio)
- Lightforge Games (RPG with AI elements)
- TRIPP (AI-powered wellness gaming)
- Raid Base (AI-native game infrastructure)

**WHY THIS FUND FITS NEXUS AI**
Lightspeed Gaming & Interactive Media demonstrates strong alignment with NEXUS AI's vision. Their Seed to Series A focus and $500K - $5M+ check size range matches our fundraising targets. 359 Capital (formerly Sapphire Sport) pursues a distinct strategy focused exclusively on early to mid-stage consumer and consumer-adjacent opportunities, with gaming and AI Applications as two of their seven primary focus areas. Their unique LP base includes iconic brands across sports, media, and entertainment (City Football Group, adidas, AEG, MSG, Sinclair) providing portfolio companies with unparalleled distribution access. Their thesis on AI in gaming centers on next-generation game engines, AI-powered content creation tools, and intelligent game infrastructure. Title: Founding Partner

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
Play Ventures is the leading gaming and consumer apps VC, with a strong emphasis on B2B, AI & Infrastructure as one of their three core investment pillars. Their newly raised $140M Fund II (December 2025) explicitly targets 'AI-enhanced gaming tools' alongside mobile free-to-play games and gaming infrastructure. They believe hyper-personalization, continuous optimization, and frictionless transactions driven by AI are transforming how games attract, retain, and monetize users. Their portfolio includes AI-powered companies like Scenario (AI game assets) and Appcharge (mobile payments infrastructure). They actively seek founders building products with 'unprecedented speed and impact' through AI.

**PARTNER DETAILS**
Name: Eitan Reisel
Title: Founder & Managing Partner
Email: eitan@vgames.vc

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
Vgames is Israel's first and leading venture fund dedicated exclusively to gaming, founded by Eitan Reisel who previously built and led the Google Games team in Tel Aviv. Their thesis centers on supporting founders through their entire lifecycle from early days to growth, with particular conviction in data-driven game development and AI-powered gaming experiences. They believe the combination of data and art is what makes a great game—and increasingly, AI is the bridge between these disciplines. They offer non-dilutive growth financing alongside traditional equity investments, giving founders flexibility in capital structure. Their focus on gaming-native founders and deep publisher relationships provides unique distribution advantages.

**FIT SCORE:** 86/100

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
The Games Fund (TGF) is the most active early-stage VC fund in the gaming industry, named one of the top funds of 2024. Founded by industry veterans Ilya Eremeev and Maria Kochmola (formerly MGVC/MY.GAMES) along with GEM Capital and ex-Riot CTO Sergey Titov, they bring deep operational and investment expertise. Their thesis centers on next-generation gaming infrastructure, including AI-powered development tools, procedural content generation, and AI-native game engines. They have strong conviction in AI's ability to democratize game creation and enable entirely new gameplay experiences. Their portfolio includes Layer AI (AI game art tools) and multiple AI-native gaming startups.
